title: Heavy Transport Vehicle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Heavy Transport Vehicle (HTV)''' was used by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] to carry spare parts and resupply units.

Every armor [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] was assigned two HTVs. They had three crewmen (doubling as general mechanics) and four additional technicians. The sergeant major could also be assigned to the support element in some cases.

Armor [[Battalion/Legends|battalions]] headquarters (HQ) were mobilized to travel in 24 HTVs, having to carry a number of droids (about 6 per vehicle), equipment and support personnel.
